resources.string: PaisaTracker is a personal expense tracking app that helps you manage UPI payments and transactions. All data is stored locally on your device.

PaisaTracker reads UPI payment notifications from apps like GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm, and bank SMS messages, to automatically detect expenses. No notification content is shared with any server. All processing happens entirely on your device. You can disable this at any time in Settings → Auto-capture.
